hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+commit' && { cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && if ! git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^CHANGELOG.md$'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"CHANGELOG.md is not staged. Per the Commit & Release Workflow in CLAUDE.md, update CHANGELOG.md before committing."}'; fi; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+push' && { cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && unreleased=$(sed -n '/^## \[Unreleased\]/,/^## \[/p' CHANGELOG.md 2>/dev/null | sed '1d;$d'); if echo "$unreleased" | grep -qE '\S'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"CHANGELOG.md has unreleased entries. Per the Commit & Release Workflow in CLAUDE.md, you MUST ask the user whether to cut a new version release BEFORE pushing."}'; fi; } || true
